category_title: Students who exhibit physical aggression to regain teacher attention during instructional interruptions
scenario_title: Music room reward interrupted by conversation with music teacher
minimal_context: The student is playing the tambourine as a reward in the music room while the instructor and music teacher are present.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are in the music room now. Do you want to play on the drums or the tambourine?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Chooses the tambourine and begins playing with it)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, go ahead. (Turns to the music teacher sitting at the desk) Do you have a minute to talk?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Notices the conversation and realizes the instructor is not providing full attention)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Continues speaking to the music teacher) We just finished our travel route.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Acts out with physical violence and strikes the instructor)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are in the music room now. Do you want to play on the drums or the tambourine?

STUDENT: (Chooses the tambourine and begins playing with it)

TUTOR: Okay, go ahead. (Turns to the music teacher sitting at the desk) Do you have a minute to talk?

STUDENT: (Notices the conversation and realizes the instructor is not providing full attention)

TUTOR: (Continues speaking to the music teacher) We just finished our travel route.

STUDENT: (Acts out with physical violence and strikes the instructor)

task.content: Playing on the tambourine as a reward.

context.social_setting: The instructor is present, and the music teacher is sitting at his desk nearby.
context.time_context: Once they are in the music room after completing a travel route

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As she is playing with it, the instructor has a word with the music teacher who is sitting at his desk.
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The student, who is nearby, once again strikes the instructor.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: The student realizes that the instructor is not providing his or her full attention.

behavior_patterns.condition: When the activity is taking attention away from the student
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: The student acts out with physical violence.
